titleStmt.title: SII 31.108: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 108. (A.R. No. B 239 of 1938.) KAMALĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Āñjanēya shrine in the compound of the Vīrabhadrasvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1473, Vīrōdhikṛit, Adhika-Bhādrapada, ba. 8, Tuesday corresponding to August 24, 1551 A.D., Monday, f.d.t. °73.

Registers the gift of 317 puṭṭis of wet land irrigated under the Mūrthireḍi kālva in Kamalapuram to maintain the temple festivals Tirupaṇa and Tirūv-ārādhana to the god Kaṁchi Varadarājaperumāl on Kṛishna Jayanti day by Daḷavāyirāju, the kāryakarta of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja pāpa Timmayadēva mahārāju. The village Kamalapuram was given as vuṁbaḷi to Daḷavāyirāju by Pāpa Timmarājayya The Pōrumāmiḷḷa-sīma in which Kamalāpuram existed was given as nāyaṁkara to mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja pāpa Timmayadēva mahārāja by the king Sadāśivadēvarāja.
This inscription is written by Tiṁmaya, son of Raghunādhayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaṣaṁbulu 1473 Agunēṭi virōdha
kratu saṁvatsara Atika bhādrapada ba8 ma . śrīmaṁnmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyaluṁgāru vijayasagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁ
hvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pridhivisāṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁvuṁnnaṁgānu śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara rāmarājupāpatiṁmmayya dēvamahārājuluṁgāri nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccina
pōrumāmilaśīmalōni kāmalāpuraṁgrāmānanuAkhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁhmāṁḍanāya
kuṁḍaina purāṇa puruṣōttamuṁḍu Ayina kāmalāpuraṁ vaddanunna kaṁcivaruda
rājaperumāḷlaku śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍṭhalēśvara rāmarāju pāpa tiṁmmayyadē
va mahārājula vāri kāryakarttalaIna daḷavāyi rājuṁgāru
sarmapiṁcina bhūdāna dharṁmmaśāsanapatrakramameṭlaṁnnanu mākupāpa tiṁmma
rājayyavāru vuṁbbaḷiki pāliṁccina kāmalāpuraṁlōni mūrttireḍḍikālvaku ceṁllē
maḍilōnuṁḍḍina dēvabrāṁhmāṇastāna mānyālu gāka gutakuniccinamaḍi kha3 ... Akṣarālānu
mūḍupuṭlu padihēṁdmumaḍinni sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakaṁgānu
dhāravōśi yistimiṁgāna Āṁdula rōkha dhānyālu tirupaṇa tiruvārādhanalaku
Avadhariṁccesēsuku Ācaṁdrārkhastāyigānu yīmūṁḍuvuṭlu padiyēḍu
mu maḍinni Amṛtapaḷaku Avadhariṁccēdi . yīmūḍupuṭlu padiyēdumu maḍiki
nnirāgala nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi siddasādhyaṁbulanēṭi Apṭabhō
gatēja svāmyatalu sahāṁgānu pāpatiṁmarājayyavāriki puṇyamuṁgānu kriṣṇa
jeyaṁti puṇyakālamaṁdu svāmivaradarājaperumāḷaku samarpistimiṁganaka
Ācaṁdrārkastāyiṁgānu tiruvaḷyemaṁdu Avadariṁccēdi . svadattaṁ paradattāṁ
vāyōharēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhivarṣanahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatēkrimi . madvaṁśa
jāḥ paramahīpati vaṁśajāvāṁ yēbhūmipāḥ satatamujjvala dharmacittāḥ maddharrmayēva
paripālanamācaraṁti tatpādukadvaya mahaṁ śirasā vahaṁtti tiṁmmana
kāmalāpuraṁ pūrakaraṇaṁ śrīpatirājatiṁmmayakoḍku yallaya vrāsina
dhaṁrmmaśāsanaṁ . gōpināyiniṁgāri pāḷeṁ kaṭṭiṁcci kaṁcci rāyani tirupaṇiki
mūrti rēni kālva sarmappaṁccina daḷavāya tiṁmmarājayya vārikaraṇaṁvī
rappa satāśēpa . kāmalāpuraṁ vūra kaṁcirāju raghuntāṁtta
yyakomāruṁḍu tiṁmmaya vrāsina dharṁmmaśāsanaṁ . śrī kriṣṇa .
Digital edition of SII 31.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
